info.description: Minimal API server for OKDP UI New
info.title: OKDP Server New API

get.description: Get the list of additional packages that clients can deploy on their own
Get the list of managed OKDP services that can be deployed per project
Returns the JSON Schema (parameters with UI metadata) for a given service version
get.summary: Get JSON Schema for a platform service

parameters.description: Package version tag (defaults to Context CR tag)
parameters.name: tag

get.description: Returns the list of versions declared in the KuboCD Context CR
get.summary: List available versions for a platform service

get.description: Returns the list of available container images per profile type from the KuboCD Context
Get a list of all projects (backed by Kubernetes Namespaces)

post.description: Create a new project (materialized as a Kubernetes Namespace)

get.description: Stream project updates using Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Get a single project by name
Get all deployed service instances for a project
get.summary: List deployed services for a project

post.description: Deploy a managed platform service into a project

get.description: Stream service status updates using Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Get a specific deployed service instance

delete.description: Remove a deployed service from a project

get.description: Aggregate CPU/memory usage (from metrics-server) and limits for every pod belonging to the instance.
get.summary: Get live resource usage for a service instance

patch.description: Merge new parameters and optionally update the package version of a deployed service

get.description: Get all pods belonging to a deployed service instance
get.summary: List pods for a service instance

get.description: Retrieve logs for a specific pod. Use follow=true for streaming via SSE.

parameters.description: Container name (defaults to first app container)
parameters.name: container

parameters.description: Number of lines from the end (default 100)
parameters.name: tailLines

get.description: Get all SparkApplication instances for a project
get.summary: List Spark applications for a project

post.description: Create and submit a SparkApplication to the Spark operator

get.description: Stream SparkApplication status updates using Server-Sent Events (SSE)

post.description: Create and submit a SparkApplication from raw YAML manifest
post.summary: Submit a Spark application from YAML

get.description: Get a specific SparkApplication instance

put.description: Update an existing SparkApplication spec fields

delete.description: Delete a SparkApplication from a project

get.description: Retrieve logs for a Spark application's driver pod. Use follow=true for streaming via SSE.

parameters.description: Number of lines from the end (default 100)
parameters.name: tailLines

get.description: Returns the Spark driver Web UI service info for a running SparkApplication
get.summary: Get Spark application driver UI info

get.description: Get all external secrets configured in the project namespace
get.summary: List external secrets for a project

post.description: Create a new ExternalSecret in the project namespace. Validates that the referenced SecretStore exists.

put.description: Update an existing ExternalSecret (name comes from URL, ignored in body)

delete.description: Delete an ExternalSecret. ESO will automatically remove the target Secret (creationPolicy: Owner).

get.description: Get the detailed status including ESO conditions and last sync time
Get all secret stores configured in the project namespace
get.summary: List secret stores for a project

post.description: Create a new secret store in the project namespace (creates K8s Secret + SecretStore CRD)
Test connectivity to a Vault server without persisting anything

put.description: Update an existing secret store (token preserved if not re-sent)

delete.description: Delete a secret store and its associated credentials secret

get.description: Get the detailed status including ESO conditions
Returns the OpenAPI spec schema from the SparkApplication CRD installed by the Spark Operator
Returns Spark operator configuration from the KuboCD Context (images, defaults, versions)
Get all groups from Kubauth

post.description: Create a new group in Kubauth

get.description: Get all users from Kubauth

post.description: Create a new user in Kubauth

get.description: Get a user details

groups.description: Groups is a computed field, not directly in the User CRD but useful for API

password.description: Password is write-only, used for creation/update
